title: Egghead Falls Under Siege
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, CP0 as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is a bitter pill to swallow...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your first instinct is to go for the kill?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I know how strong you boys are...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: fighting you fair and square would've been stupid.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Just a moment!! What is this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are the CPO agents at each other's throats?

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: I put them both to sleep.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No doubt he was taken by surprise...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her loyalty to me was kept secret even after she spent 20 years as one of their agents.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You had a mole in the intelligence branch?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It wasn't our intention, but that's how it turned out.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
